termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.welcomeText: Welcome to Habiby Clinic. By accessing and using our mobile application and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. Please read these terms carefully before using our services.
termsAndConditions.acceptanceOfTermsText: By registering for an account, booking therapy sessions, or using any features of the Habiby Clinic app, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and our Privacy Policy.
termsAndConditions.eligibilityText: You must be at least 18 years old or have parental/guardian consent to use our services. By using the app, you represent that you meet these eligibility requirements. Guardians may create accounts on behalf of their children/dependents for therapy services.
termsAndConditions.servicesProvidedText: Habiby Clinic provides mental health and therapy services through our platform, including but not limited to:
termsAndConditions.servicesList:
• Booking therapy sessions with licensed professionals
• Medication management and reminders
• Feelings diary and mood tracking
• Access to medical history and treatment plans
• Homework assessments and follow-ups
• Online and in-clinic appointments
termsAndConditions.userResponsibilitiesList:
• Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
• Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
• Use the services only for lawful purposes
• Attend scheduled appointments or provide timely cancellation notice
• Follow prescribed treatment plans and medication schedules
termsAndConditions.appointmentsAndCancellationsText:
• You may book, reschedule, or cancel appointments through the app
• Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the scheduled time
• Late cancellations or no-shows may result in charges
• Reschedule requests are subject to therapist availability
termsAndConditions.paymentTermsText:
• All fees must be paid in full at the time of booking unless otherwise agreed
• We accept credit card payments and cash (for in-clinic visits)
• Prices are displayed in Egyptian Pounds (EGP)
• Refunds are subject to our refund policy and may take 7-14 business days
termsAndConditions.medicalDisclaimerText: The services provided through Habiby Clinic are not intended to replace emergency medical care. In case of a medical emergency, please contact emergency services immediately. Our therapists provide professional mental health support, but outcomes cannot be guaranteed.
termsAndConditions.medicationManagementText: If prescribed medication through our services:
termsAndConditions.medicationManagementList:
• Follow all instructions provided by your healthcare provider
• Report any side effects immediately
• Use medication reminders as a tool, not a substitute for personal responsibility
• Do not share prescribed medications with others
termsAndConditions.privacyAndDataProtectionText: Your privacy is important to us. All personal health information is protected in accordance with applicable laws and our Privacy Policy. We use secure encryption for data transmission and storage.
termsAndConditions.intellectualPropertyText: All content, features, and functionality of the Habiby Clinic app, including text, graphics, logos, and software, are the exclusive property of Habiby Clinic and are protected by copyright and trademark laws.
termsAndConditions.limitationOfLiabilityText: Habiby Clinic shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the services in question.
termsAndConditions.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms and Conditions or engage in fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activities. You may delete your account at any time through the app settings.
termsAndConditions.changesToTermsText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
termsAndConditions.governingLawText: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Egypt.
termsAndConditions.contactInformationText: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
termsAndConditions.contactDetails:
Email: support@habibyclinic.com
Phone: +20 XXX XXX XXXX
Address: Cairo, Egypt
termsAndConditions.acknowledgment: By using Habiby Clinic, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms and Conditions and agree to be bound by them.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introduction: At Habiby Clinic, we are committed to protecting your privacy and safeguarding your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your data when you use our mobile application and services.
privacyPolicy.personalInformationList:
• Name, email address, phone number, date of birth
• Gender and user type (client or guardian)
• Account credentials and authentication data
privacyPolicy.healthInformationList:
• Medical history, diagnoses, and treatment plans
• Medication records and prescriptions
• Therapy session notes and assessments
• Feelings diary entries and mood tracking data
• Medication side effects and health monitoring data
privacyPolicy.usageInformationList:
• Device information (model, operating system, unique identifiers)
• App usage patterns and preferences
• Location data (when you enable location services)
• Payment transaction information
privacyPolicy.howWeUseYourInformationList:
• Provide and manage therapy services and appointments
• Connect you with licensed therapists and healthcare professionals
• Send medication reminders and appointment notifications
• Maintain your medical records and treatment history
• Process payments and billing
• Improve our services and user experience
• Communicate important updates and service information
• Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
privacyPolicy.dataSharingAndDisclosureText: We may share your information with:
privacyPolicy.healthcareProvidersText: Your therapists and healthcare professionals who provide treatment services to you.
privacyPolicy.serviceProvidersText: Third-party companies that help us operate our services (e.g., payment processors, cloud storage providers, notification services). These providers are bound by confidentiality agreements.
privacyPolicy.legalRequirementsText: We may disclose information when required by law, court order, or to protect the safety of individuals.
privacyPolicy.noSaleOfData: We do NOT sell your personal or health information to third parties.
privacyPolicy.dataSecurityText: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
privacyPolicy.dataSecurityList:
• End-to-end encryption for sensitive health information
• Secure data storage using Firebase and encrypted databases
• Secure authentication and password protection
• Regular security audits and updates
• Limited access to personal data by authorized personnel only
privacyPolicy.yourRightsAndChoicesList:
• Access your personal and health information
• Request corrections to inaccurate information
• Delete your account and associated data
• Opt-out of non-essential notifications
• Download a copy of your data
• Withdraw consent for data processing (where applicable)
privacyPolicy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, contact us at support@habibyclinic.com
privacyPolicy.dataRetentionText: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide services and comply with legal obligations. Medical records are retained according to healthcare regulations and may be kept for up to 10 years after your last appointment.
privacyPolicy.childrensPrivacyText: Our services may be used by minors under the supervision of a parent or guardian. Guardian accounts can manage their dependents' health information. We comply with all applicable laws regarding children's data protection.
privacyPolicy.internationalDataTransfersText: Your data may be processed and stored in servers located outside Egypt. We ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyServicesText: Our app may integrate with third-party services such as:
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyServicesList:
• Firebase (Google) for authentication and data storage
• Stripe for payment processing
• Google Maps for location services
• Microsoft Teams for video sessions
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyServicesNote: These services have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them.
privacyPolicy.cookiesAndTrackingText: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve app functionality and analyze usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences through your device settings.
privacyPolicy.changesToPrivacyPolicyText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. The "Effective Date" at the top indicates when the policy was last updated.
privacyPolicy.contactUsText: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:
privacyPolicy.contactUsDetails:
Email: privacy@habibyclinic.com
Phone: +20 XXX XXX XXXX
Address: Cairo, Egypt
privacyPolicy.commitment: Your privacy and trust are essential to us. We are committed to protecting your personal and health information in accordance with the highest standards of data protection.
